manifest.author: ioannisxirouxakis
manifest.changelog:
ioannisxirr's Instafel backup v66😈

- You can now send the messages from chats directly to Meta AI. Long press the message to try it out!
- You can now react again to stories with emojis other than the default ones, while also added new animations and redesigned them.
- Fixed some slight issues with the Instagram Events.
- You can now share voice messages that are made using the voice message effects to your story.
- Redesigned the Instagram logo.
- Minor changes and clean-ups.
manifest.name: ioannisxir's Instafel Backup
manifest.description: Yeah, most popular backup in the world!
